title: Bat Removal & Exclusion in Yonkers, NY | $900 – $2,500
metaDescription: Professional bat removal and exclusion services in Yonkers, Westchester. Humane bat extraction, attic cleanup, and permanent exclusion. Licensed experts. Call today for a free estimate!
intro: Bats in your Yonkers attic or walls? Best Pest Control NYC provides expert bat removal and exclusion services throughout Yonkers and Westchester County. Our licensed technicians use humane, effective methods to safely remove bats and seal entry points to prevent their return, protecting your home and family.
whyUs: With over a decade serving Yonkers homeowners, we understand the unique challenges posed by the city's mix of historic homes and modern buildings. Our team is fully licensed, insured, and trained in humane bat exclusion techniques that comply with New York State wildlife regulations.
localContext: Yonkers' diverse architecture—from Victorian homes near Getty Square to Tudor-style residences in Crestwood and multi-family buildings along the Hudson River—often provides ideal entry points for bats seeking shelter. The city's proximity to wooded parks like Untermyer Gardens and Van Cortlandt Park creates abundant bat habitat, making professional exclusion essential for property protection.

faqs.question: How much does bat removal cost in Yonkers?
faqs.answer: Bat removal and exclusion services in Yonkers typically range from $900 to $2,500, depending on the size of the colony, number of entry points, and extent of exclusion work needed. We provide free inspections and detailed estimates before any work begins.

faqs.question: Is bat removal in Yonkers safe and humane?
faqs.answer: Yes, we follow all New York State wildlife regulations and use only humane exclusion methods. We never trap or harm bats—instead, we install one-way exclusion devices that allow bats to leave naturally but prevent re-entry, ensuring compliance with protected species laws.

faqs.question: When is the best time for bat exclusion in Yonkers?
faqs.answer: The ideal time for bat exclusion in Yonkers is during spring (March-April) or fall (August-October). We avoid exclusion during summer maternity season (May-July) when flightless baby bats are present, as required by New York wildlife protection laws.

faqs.question: Do you clean up bat droppings and repair damage?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Our comprehensive service includes safe removal of bat guano and contaminated insulation, attic decontamination and sanitization, odor elimination, and repairs to damaged areas. We restore your attic to a safe, clean condition after bat exclusion is complete.
